raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Vietnamese American Service Center (VASC) in San Jose is the first of its kind in the nation.",
    "The VASC will serve as a model for other major cities with large Vietnamese-American populations.",
    "Santa Clara County has revealed significant health disparities and cultural/language barriers affecting Vietnamese residents.",
    "The VASC will be a 37,000 square foot hub for health and human services tailored to Vietnamese residents.",
    "Approximately 13 percent of Vietnamese-American families in Santa Clara County live below the poverty line.",
    "Vietnamese-Americans have a one in four chance of achieving a college education.",
    "Less than 0.5 percent of the Vietnamese-American population attains a graduate level degree.",
    "Vietnamese-American women have the highest rate of cervical cancer in the United States.",
    "Vietnamese-American women are diagnosed with cervical cancer five times more than any other ethnic and racial group.",
    "One in eight Vietnamese-Americans carry the Hepatitis B virus.",
    "Vietnamese adults are diagnosed with liver cancer at four times the rate of adults in Santa Clara County.",
    "More Vietnamese-American adults have been diagnosed with diabetes than all Asian Americans, Pacific Islanders, and Caucasians in Santa Clara County."
  ]
}
```
